name: Method Classification review for Validity Conditions Claim Hardening Update bundle
summary: Accepted. The claim updates classify the new evidence as task-bound model/workflow and prompt/workflow sensitivity, with no cross-task model ranking or universal prompt prescription.

findings.claim_or_issue: New support is framed as model/workflow sensitivity rather than a pure model-family effect.
findings.why_it_matters: Several included studies vary prompts, workflows, training, and comparators together.
